description: Case style: Stainless steel round case  with dull gold bezelDial style: White dial with silver hands  Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly claspFeatures: Date rapture on the dial, Ssteele branding on the 12 hour mark, Maxima branding on the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time   Waterproof to 3 ATM, allowing you to wear it even when showeringWarranty: 1 year
